prompt: I need to add Salesforce.com to my Okta demo tenant so I can show automated user provisioning and SSO for an ILM use case. I haven't set up the Salesforce org yet and don't have the demo details handy.

assertions.name: asks-for-missing-inputs
assertions.check: Output asks for the Salesforce org URL and/or Okta demo name before attempting setup steps

assertions.name: mentions-developer-edition-signup
assertions.check: Output mentions or links to Salesforce Developer Edition free signup (developer.salesforce.com/signup)

assertions.name: does-not-proceed-blindly
assertions.check: Output does NOT attempt to provide specific SAML values or browse commands without having the org URL

assertions.name: explains-prerequisites
assertions.check: Output explains what is needed (Salesforce org, Okta demo tenant) before proceeding
